---
pagetitle: "Mehdi Khribch"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
  body {
    background: url('images/cherkaoui-bg.jpg') center center / cover no-repeat fixed !important;
    background-color: #1a1a2e !important;
  }
  #quarto-content {
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.88) !important;
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 2.5em 3em !important;
    margin-top: 1.5em;
    margin-bottom: 1.5em;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
    backdrop-filter: blur(2px);
  }
  .nav-footer {
    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7) !important;
    color: #ccc !important;
  }
</style>

<div class="about-container">
  <div class="about-sidebar">
    <img src="images/profile.png" class="about-photo" alt="Mehdi Khribch">
    <div class="about-links">
      <a href="mailto:elmahdi.khribch@essec.edu"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Email</a>
      <a href="https://github.com/mehdi-khribch"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub</a>
      <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=bdvW1McAAAAJ"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill"></i> Google Scholar</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="about-main">
    <h2>About Me</h2>
    <p>I am a final-year PhD candidate in the <a href="https://ido-department.essec.edu/home">Department of Information Systems, Data Analytics and Operations</a> at ESSEC Business School, in Paris, France, working with <a href="https://sites.google.com/site/pierrejacob/">Pierre E. Jacob</a> and <a href="https://pierrealquier.github.io/">Pierre Alquier</a>. Prior to that, I received an Engineering Degree from <a href="https://www.minesparis.psl.eu/">Mines Paris PSL University</a>. Before that, I obtained the <a href="https://www.master-mva.com/">Master MVA (Mathématiques, Vision, Apprentissage)</a> at <a href="https://ens-paris-saclay.fr/">ENS Paris-Saclay</a>, and I also hold an MSc in Statistical Science from the <a href="https://www.stats.ox.ac.uk/">Department of Statistics, University of Oxford</a>.</p>
    <h2>Research Interests</h2>
    <p>My research interests lie in computational statistics and Bayesian inference. I focus on unbiased MCMC methods using coupling techniques, PAC-Bayesian theory for robust statistical inference, and variational approximations. My goal is to develop scalable, theoretically grounded algorithms for computational statistics and machine learning.</p>
  </div>
</div>
```
